calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Huster appeared by Zoom for Victor Rodriguez.

Mr. Huster confirmed that he has lost contact with Mr. Rodriguez and stated that he has no objection to taking this petition off calendar. The Court noted that the matter was called twice, that there is no appearance by Mr. Rodriguez, ordered that the petition be taken off calendar and stated that if Mr. Rodriguez wants to pursue this, he can file a new petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is off calendar. The order to appear is also off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-14-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Continued To Jul-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Mr. Huster was here today on another matter but may not have realized that this was on calendar. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Thomas Huster to appear on July 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and what is going on with this petition. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Reyes. Not reported.
